trivia_bullets.text: Aetherdrift (DFT) is MTG's 103rd expansion, released February 14, 2025. The set takes place across three planes — Avishkar (formerly Kaladesh), Amonkhet, and Muraganda — during the Ghirapur Grand Prix, a cross-planar racing event organized by night minister Gonti. [Scryfall: released_at 2025-02-14; Wizards Planeswalker's Guide to Aetherdrift Part 1, via WebSearch]
sources: Wizards.com Planeswalker's Guide to Aetherdrift Part 1, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "In life, she commanded the respect of her army. In death, she demands it." — No named speaker. The line foregrounds the card's type line: Zombie Cat Knight — a creature who has crossed death and retained command authority, now enforcing obedience rather than earning it. [Scryfall: flavor_text field]

Risen Necroregent costs 5 mana (4B) for a 5/4 Zombie Cat Knight. Its 'Start Your Engines!' trigger and Max Speed zombie-token generation make it a late-game value engine in black aggro or racing-theme decks. EDHREC rank 17,372 — low inclusion suggesting it sees little Commander play; its power lives in Standard and Pioneer race-to-max-speed strategies. [Scryfall: edhrec_rank 17372, legalities]

related_cards.name: Risen Reef

related_cards.name: Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver
related_cards.note: Top Zombie tribal commander; Necroregent's token production synergizes with Wilhelt sacrifice loops
